branding.title: Branding & theme
branding.subtitle: Update how your learning site looks — for students and staff after they sign in, and on the login screen.
branding.subtitlePlain: You don’t need any technical skills: pick colors and images, then press Save at the bottom. Everyone on your site will see the changes.
branding.loginImageHelp: Usually filled automatically after upload, or paste a public HTTPS image URL.
branding.loginImageHelpFriendly: Easiest: use “Upload” below. Only paste a link here if your image is already hosted online (must start with https://).
branding.loginLogoUrlHelp: Optional. Shown on the sign-in screen and at the top of the app menu. Use only if your logo is already on the web; otherwise leave empty.
branding.previewBody: Sample text uses your theme colors.
branding.loginCopyHint: Override the default headline, typography, and logo size on the right side of the login screen. Sizes use CSS units (e.g. 2.25rem, 36px).
branding.loginCopyHintShort: Change the welcome message visitors see next to the login form. Open “More options” only if you want to fine-tune sizes or fonts.
branding.sidebarLogoSectionHint: The logo at the top of the vertical menu. Leave these empty to reuse the sign-in logo size (adjusted to fit the menu).
branding.sidebarLogoDimHelp: Width 40–220, height 24–80 (pixels). Empty fields follow the sign-in logo size.
branding.sectionPalette: Choose a look for your site
branding.sectionPaletteDesc: Click a card to try a full color set. You can still adjust individual colors in the next step.
branding.sectionAppChromeDesc: These control the vertical menu (and bottom menu on phones), plus the main action buttons.
branding.sectionAppChromeTip: Skip this if you are happy with the preset. Only change these if you want the menu or buttons a bit different.
branding.sidebarBgHint: The strip along the side (and bottom on mobile) where people switch pages.
branding.sidebarBgHelp: Dark colors usually work best with light text.
branding.sidebarTextHint: Labels and icons in the side menu. White or very light colors are easiest to read on a dark menu.
branding.brandPrimaryHint: Used for important buttons and the highlight on the current page in the menu.
branding.brandPrimaryHelp: Pick a color that stands out but still reads well on white areas.
branding.navActiveTextHint: Color of the menu label for the page someone is on.
branding.sectionSignInMediaDesc: Photo or graphic behind the login box (on larger screens). We store uploads securely for you.
branding.previewLiveHint: This preview updates as you type — no need to save first.
branding.footerHint: Save applies your changes for everyone. Discard puts back the last saved version (this page only).
branding.saveDisabledHint: Change something above to enable Save.
branding.presetAppliedHint: Palette updated from preset — review sign-in options if needed.
branding.presetGalleryHint: Each picture is a tiny preview: menu on the side, page area, and a sample button. Click one to use that style.
branding.guideStep1: Pick a look you like (you can change it any time).
branding.guideStep2: Optionally adjust menu and button colors.
branding.guideStep3: Add a login screen photo with Upload if you want.
branding.guideStep4: Edit the welcome headline if you like, then press Save at the bottom.
branding.colorPickerHint: Click the colored square to choose a color.
branding.showColorCode: I have an exact color code (advanced)
branding.loginSloganHelp: This is the big message next to the login form. Leave blank to keep the default.
branding.loginAdvancedShow: More options: font sizes, weights, logo size…
branding.loginAdvancedIntro: These settings are optional. Leave fields empty to keep the defaults.
branding.fontSizeHelp: Optional. Examples: 36px or 2rem. Leave blank for automatic sizing.
branding.loginSloganColorHint: Color of the big headline on the login screen.
branding.loginBrandColorHint: Color of your organization name on the login screen.
branding.loginLogoDimHelp: Optional. Size in pixels — only change if the logo looks too big or small.
branding.presetCustomDesc: Keep editing colors manually below without replacing everything from a preset.
branding.presetGroupBlurb_classic: Balanced palettes for everyday learning products.
branding.presetGroupBlurb_vibrant: Saturated accents that pop on marketing and youth-facing sites.
branding.presetGroupBlurb_high_contrast: Strong separation between shell, text, and CTAs for accessibility.

common.notFoundDescription: Oops! The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved. Please check the URL or return to the dashboard to continue.

auth.slogan: Changing the  way  the  world  learns
auth.profileInactiveDefault: Your account for this organization is not active yet. An administrator may still need to activate it. Please check back later or contact your organization if this continues.
auth.googleSignInFailed: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.
auth.googleError: Google sign-in encountered an error. Please try again.
auth.googleInitFailed: Failed to initialize Google sign-in. Please refresh the page.
auth.googleLoadFailed: Failed to load Google sign-in. Please check your connection.
auth.googleLoading: Google sign-in is loading. Please try again in a moment.
auth.otpSent: OTP sent to your email. Please verify your account.
auth.resetDescription: Enter the email for your account.
auth.emailSentMessage: We've sent a password reset link to your email. Please check your inbox and follow the instructions to reset your password.
auth.forgotPasswordOtpStepDescription: Enter the 6-digit code we sent to your email.
auth.forgotPasswordNewPasswordStepDescription: Choose a new password for your account.
auth.passwordResetPasswordHint: Use at least 8 characters including uppercase, lowercase, and a number. Avoid passwords similar to your email or name.
auth.resetCodeSent: A verification code has been sent.
auth.resetRequestFailed: We couldn’t complete that request. Please try again.
auth.resetPasswordFailed: That code may be incorrect or expired. Request a new code and try again.
auth.resetPasswordSuccessToast: Your password has been updated. You can sign in.
auth.resetLinkSent: Password reset link sent to your email
auth.resetLinkFailed: Failed to send reset link. Please try again.
auth.verifyDescription: Enter the 6-digit OTP code sent to your email address to verify your account.
auth.instructorSignupApprovalTitle: Your account gets a quick admin check
auth.instructorSignupApprovalNote: Kindly verify your email address and await administrative approval. You will be able to sign in once your account has been approved.
auth.passwordResetOtpResent: A new verification code has been sent.
auth.passwordResetResendHint: Only the latest code is valid.
auth.resendFailed: We couldn’t resend the code just now. Please try again in a moment.

tools.scratchHint: Rough work only. Copy and paste are disabled. Notes are not submitted.

assessments.title: Assessments
assessments.subtitle: Test your knowledge and track your progress
assessments.adjustSearchFilter: Try adjusting your search or filter criteria
assessments.checkBackLater: Check back later for new assessments
assessments.startAcknowledgment: By clicking "Start Assessment", you acknowledge that you have read and understood all instructions and agree to abide by the examination rules and proctoring policies.
assessments.scholarshipOffered: You have been offered a {{percent}}% scholarship!
assessments.submittedReview: Your assessment has been submitted and is being reviewed. You will receive results shortly.

deviceCheck.title: Device check
deviceCheck.noFaceDetected: No face detected. Please position yourself in front of the camera.
deviceCheck.multipleFaces: {{count}} faces detected. Only one person should be visible.

submitChecklist.title: Review before you submit
submitChecklist.subtitle: Go through each section and question. Green means we detected an answer or attempt; amber still needs your attention.
submitChecklist.allCompleteHint: Everything looks answered. You can still review the list below, then confirm.
submitChecklist.pendingHint: You still have {{count}} question(s) without a clear response. You may submit anyway after confirming below.
submitChecklist.confirmCheckbox: I understand my responses will be finalized and I cannot change them after submission.
submitChecklist.noSections: No sections are loaded for this assessment. Try refreshing the page.

mockInterview.title: Mock Interview
mockInterview.subtitle: Practice with AI-powered mock interviews
mockInterview.practiceSubtitle: Prepare for your dream job with AI-powered mock interviews

modeSelector.selectModeSubtitle: Select the mode that best fits your preparation style
modeSelector.quickStartTip1: You want to practice right now
modeSelector.quickStartTip2: You need a fast interview session
modeSelector.scheduleTip3: You prefer to prepare in advance

deviceCheck.title: Device Check
deviceCheck.description: Before starting your interview, we need to verify that your camera and microphone are working properly. This ensures a smooth interview experience.
deviceCheck.readToVerify: Read the text below to verify your microphone
deviceCheck.listening: Listening... Please speak the text above.
deviceCheck.textNoMatch: Text doesn't match. Please try again.
deviceCheck.whyDescription: Your camera and microphone are essential for the interview process. We use your camera to monitor the session and ensure a fair assessment. Your microphone records your answers and is used for speech analysis. Both devices must be working properly before you can proceed.
deviceCheck.faceDetectedOk: Face detected and positioned correctly. You can proceed.
deviceCheck.browserNotSupported: Your browser doesn't support camera/microphone access
deviceCheck.speechNotSupported: Speech recognition not supported in this browser
deviceCheck.noSpeech: No speech detected. Please try again.
deviceCheck.speechError: Speech recognition error. Please try again.
deviceCheck.cameraNotAccessible: Camera is not accessible or not working properly
deviceCheck.micNotAccessible: Microphone is not accessible or not working properly
deviceCheck.permissionDenied: Camera/microphone access denied. Please allow access and try again.
deviceCheck.noCameraFound: No camera found. Please connect a camera and try again.
deviceCheck.noMicFound: No microphone found. Please connect a microphone and try again.
deviceCheck.alreadyInUse: Camera is already in use by another application.
deviceCheck.micAlreadyInUse: Microphone is already in use by another application.
deviceCheck.failedCamera: Failed to access camera. Please check your device settings.
deviceCheck.failedMic: Failed to access microphone. Please check your device settings.

profile.title: Profile

profile.noSummaryClickEdit: No summary available. Click Edit to add one.
profile.profileAlmostThere: You're almost there! Complete your profile to stand out to recruiters.

profile.tooltipImportFromProfile: Import data from your profile section
profile.uploadResumeToGetStarted: Upload a PDF resume or save one from the Resume tab
profile.resumeSaveToProfileFailed: Failed to save resume to profile
profile.resumeLimitReached: Maximum {{max}} resumes allowed. Delete one to upload a new one.
profile.deleteResumeMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
profile.pdfDownloadFailed: Failed to generate PDF. Please try again.
profile.atsScoreTooltip: Score reflects format, completeness, content depth, and keyword match to job description. Based on common ATS criteria.
profile.atsScoreLabelFair: Fair — add more content and keywords
profile.atsScoreLabelWeak: Needs work — improve sections and keywords
profile.atsJobDescPlaceholder: Paste a job description to see how well your resume matches…
profile.atsVerifyWithAICta: This is an estimated score. For the detailed ATS score and job fit, verify with AI.
profile.atsFallbackBanner: Showing estimated score because AI analysis is unavailable
profile.atsScoreCalculatedFrom: This score is calculated based on the variables listed below.
profile.atsScoreRepresents: This score represents how well your resume is likely to perform in Applicant Tracking Systems used by employers.
profile.atsRefineAdvice: Keep refining your resume to improve your chances of getting past ATS filters and into the hands of recruiters.
profile.atsScoreButtonTooltip: View ATS score and full report
profile.atsResumeGoodFor: What your resume is good for
profile.atsWhereDeducted: Where you lost the most points
profile.atsWhereDeductedHint: These areas pulled your overall score down. Focus on improving them first.

liveSessions.emptyStateTitle: No live sessions at the moment

liveSessions.featureBlockedDesc: This feature is not available. Contact your administrator if you believe this is an error.
liveSessions.name: Name
liveSessions.recordingNotAvailable: Recording isn't available yet. It may still be processing, or the host can sync the recording from the session details.

adminLiveSessions.title: Live Sessions
adminLiveSessions.subtitle: View and verify live sessions. Start meeting (host), open join link, sync attendance and recording.
adminLiveSessions.emptyStateDesc: There are no Zoom live sessions at the moment.
adminLiveSessions.emptyStateAction: Create a live session to get started.
adminLiveSessions.featureBlockedTitle: Live sessions are not enabled for your profile
adminLiveSessions.featureBlockedDesc: This feature is not available. Contact your administrator if you believe this is an error.
adminLiveSessions.endMeetingConfirmDesc: All participants will be disconnected. This cannot be undone.
adminLiveSessions.timesLocalTimezone: Times are in your local timezone.
adminLiveSessions.topicMinLength: Topic name must be at least 2 characters
adminLiveSessions.pleaseEnterClassDateTime: Please enter class date and time
adminLiveSessions.classDateTimeFuture: Class date and time must be in the future
adminLiveSessions.sessionCreatedPrompt: Session "{{topic}}" was created. Create a Zoom meeting to get the start and join links.
adminLiveSessions.zoomReadyPrompt: Your Zoom session is ready. Start the meeting or share the join link with students.
adminLiveSessions.zoomCredentialsDesc: Configure Zoom account and API credentials for this client. Used for creating and managing live sessions.
adminLiveSessions.zoomClientSecret: Zoom Client Secret (leave blank to keep existing)
adminLiveSessions.webhookSecret: Webhook Secret (leave blank to keep existing)
adminLiveSessions.webhookSecretHelper: From Zoom Marketplace → your app → Event Subscriptions → Secret token.
adminLiveSessions.saveCredentialsToSeeWebhook: Save credentials to see webhook URL
adminLiveSessions.webhookEndpointHint: In Zoom Marketplace → your app → Event Subscriptions, set Endpoint URL to this value.
adminLiveSessions.requiredScopes: Required scopes (Zoom Marketplace → your app → Feature)
adminLiveSessions.reauthorizeHint: After adding scopes, re-authorize the app if Zoom prompts you so new tokens include them.
adminLiveSessions.eventSubscriptions: Event Subscriptions (Zoom Marketplace → your app → Event Subscriptions)
adminLiveSessions.endpointUrlHint: Endpoint URL — use the Webhook URL shown above (from the API)
adminLiveSessions.secretTokenHint: Secret token — copy from Zoom and paste into "Webhook Secret" above
adminLiveSessions.subscribeToEvents: Subscribe to: Meeting has ended (meeting.ended) and Recording has been completed (recording.completed)
adminLiveSessions.requiredWhenSetup: Required when setting up for the first time: {{fields}}.
adminLiveSessions.attendanceSyncHint: Attendance is synced automatically when the meeting ends. Use "Sync attendance" to refresh or if sync hasn't run yet.
adminLiveSessions.noAttendanceData: No attendance data. Click "Sync attendance" to fetch from Zoom.
adminLiveSessions.noParticipantsFound: No participants found for this meeting.

adminManageStudents.name: Name

adminManageStudents.clickToUpload: Click to upload or drag and drop
adminManageStudents.duplicateEmailsFound: Duplicate emails found. Please ensure all emails are unique before proceeding.
adminManageStudents.noValidStudentsInFiles: No valid students found in {{count}} file(s). Please check {{errors}} error(s).
adminManageStudents.parsedWithErrors: Parsed {{valid}} valid student(s) from {{files}} file(s). {{errors}} row(s) skipped due to missing/invalid data.
adminManageStudents.filesNotCsv: {{count}} file(s) are not CSV files and were skipped
adminManageStudents.pleaseUploadCsvWithStudents: Please upload a CSV file with at least one valid student (name and email required)
adminManageStudents.duplicateEmailsRemove: Duplicate emails found. Please remove duplicates and re-upload with all unique emails.
adminManageStudents.pleaseSelectCourse: Please select at least one course
adminManageStudents.duplicateEmailsDesc: The following email addresses appear multiple times in your CSV file. Please remove duplicates and re-upload with all unique emails.
adminManageStudents.skippedRowsDesc: The following rows were skipped due to missing or invalid data. Only rows with both name and email are processed.
adminManageStudents.noValidStudentsDesc: All rows were skipped. Please ensure your CSV has at least one row with both name and email fields.
adminManageStudents.selectCoursesDesc: Select one or more courses to enroll students in
adminManageStudents.confirmEnrollmentDesc: Review the details before creating the enrollment job
adminManageStudents.noteSkippedRows: Note: {{skipped}} row(s) from the CSV were skipped due to missing or invalid data (name/email required). Only the {{valid}} valid student(s) above will be processed.
adminManageStudents.asyncJobNote: This will create an asynchronous job. You can track the progress after submission.

adminCourseBuilder.deleteCourseMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{{title}}"? This will permanently remove the course and all its modules and submodules. This action cannot be undone.
adminCourseBuilder.deleteModuleMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{{title}}" and all its submodules? This action cannot be undone.

adminAICourseBuilder.moduleSubmodulesRequired: Module {{num}} must have at least one submodule with title

adminAICourseBuilder.eachModuleOneSubmodule: Each module must have at least one submodule.
adminAICourseBuilder.someTasksFailed: Some tasks failed. Use "Regenerate task" on failed items below to retry, or regenerate by submodule.
adminAICourseBuilder.regenerateBySubmoduleNote: Regenerate by submodule or by individual task/content after content has been generated.
adminAICourseBuilder.taskListNotLoaded: Task list not loaded. Refresh to see failed tasks and retry options.
